title: Sri Vinayagar Vijayam
subTitle: Follow the life and incredible story of Lord Ganesha from his childhood to his divinity, recounting famous mythological events that lead to his rise as a revered deity and remover of obstacles.

title: Aayusu Nooru
subTitle: Azhagamma, a village girl, has two men vying for her affection, Subramani, her lover and the village doctor. However, she is confused about who she wants to be with and faces a dilemma.

title: Mundravathu Kann
subTitle: A young woman trapped in her home accidentally records a horrific crime next door, triggering a dangerous game of cat and mouse as the killer tries to silence her.

title: Karmegam
subTitle: A military officer returns home to find his village stuck in the past, under the thumb of an abusive landlord. He urges them to revolt against their oppressor and learns a dark secret about his past.

title: Jallikattu Kaalai
subTitle: Gopalkrishnan, an ordinary mill worker, falls in love with the mill owner's daughter. However, a vicious landlord causes a stir in their lives.

title: Moovendhar
subTitle: After marrying a young man from a family known for their volatile temper, a woman finds herself in a quandary when things do not go as she had hoped.

title: Aattanayagann
subTitle: Lingam is shocked after his sister-in-law informs him that his brother, Chandran, is a dreaded gangster. To set things right, Lingam decides to reform his brother.

title: Otran
subTitle: A group of terrorists kidnaps Sudha and takes over her apartment to save their employer Robert. Karthik, a RAW agent, pretends to be a cook and goes to her house to capture the entire gang.

subTitle: Gopalkrishnan, an ordinary mill worker, falls in love with the mill owner's daughter. However, a vicious landlord causes a stir in their lives.

title: Chinna Kannamma
subTitle: Aravind and Gayathri get married against their parents' wishes and they live happily with their daughter, Saranya. However, when Gayathri dies, Aravind discovers that Saranya is not his daughter.

title: Aattanayagann
subTitle: Lingam is shocked after his sister-in-law informs him that his brother, Chandran, is a dreaded gangster. To set things right, Lingam decides to reform his brother.

title: Otran

title: Kadhalum Kadanthu Pogum
subTitle: When a rugged thug with a hidden gentle side meets his newly single, IT consultant neighbour, an improbable romance blossoms against all odds.

title: Attagasam
subTitle: Jeeva and Guru are twins who get separated in childhood by their mother in order to save their lives. When they reunite several years later, Guru swaps places with Jeeva.

title: Palakkattu Madhavan
subTitle: Madhavan, frustrated by his wife Lakshmi's success, adopts Pattu Maami, an elderly woman, for financial gain. But as their bond grows, Madhavan faces unexpected life changes and emotional growth.

title: Rasukutti
subTitle: Rasukutty, an uneducated man, lies to his fiancee Rukmani that he is a lawyer. However, after Rukmani learns the truth, she breaks her engagement with him and starts hating him.

title: Kadhalum Kadanthu Pogum
subTitle: When a rugged thug with a hidden gentle side meets his newly single, IT consultant neighbour, an improbable romance blossoms against all odds.

title: Thangachi
subTitle: Raja, an honest police officer, curbs several illegal activities done by Dharmaraja, a corrupt politician. However, Raja is unaware that his brother-in-law is an associate of Dharmaraja.

title: Thanga Manasukkaran
subTitle: Chellakili and Murugan are long-lost lovers who unite when Murugan visits her village disguised as a musician, Murugesh. Chellakili's aunt then devises a sinister plot to separate them.

title: Yamirukka Bayamen
subTitle: Karpagam believes in Lord Murugan whereas Viji, an atheist, mocks her beliefs. She challenges that after a year her life will be better than Karpagam's. Their situations change when they meet again.

title: Veetla Visheshanga
subTitle: A widower helps a woman by admitting her to the hospital. However, complications arise when the doctor convinces her that he is her husband.
